About

Trusted by the Punjabi Community

Punjabi Finance was built to bridge the gap between complex financial topics and the Punjabi community. Whether you're a newcomer to Canada or a second-generation professional, financial literacy shouldn't require a finance degree.

From Super Visa insurance for your parents to building a retirement plan — we explain it simply, in the language our community speaks.
